import * as React from "react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";
import { type GetVariants } from "tailwindest";

const alertVariants = /**
 * @defaultVariants {
      variant: "default",
    }
 */
tw.variants({
    base: {
        position: "relative",
        width: "w-full",
        borderRadius: "rounded-lg",
        borderWidth: "border",
        padding: ["px-4", "py-3"],
        fontSize: "text-sm",
        "[&>svg+div]": {
            translate: "[&>svg+div]:translate-y-[-3px]",
        },
        "[&>svg]": {
            position: "[&>svg]:absolute",
            left: "[&>svg]:left-4",
            top: "[&>svg]:top-4",
            color: "[&>svg]:text-foreground",
        },
        "[&>svg~*]": {
            padding: "[&>svg~*]:pl-7",
        },
    },
    variants: {
        variant: {
            default: {
                backgroundColor: "bg-background",
                color: "text-foreground",
            },
            destructive: {
                borderWidth: "border-destructive/50",
                color: "text-destructive",
                dark: {
                    borderWidth: "dark:border-destructive",
                },
                "[&>svg]": {
                    color: "[&>svg]:text-destructive",
                },
            },
        },
    },
})

const Alert = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & GetVariants<typeof alertVariants>
>(({ className, variant, ...props }, ref) => (
  <div
    ref={ref}
    role="alert"
    className={tw.join(alertVariants.class({ variant }), className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
Alert.displayName = "Alert"

const AlertTitle = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLParagraphElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <h5
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join("mb-1 font-medium leading-none tracking-tight", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
AlertTitle.displayName = "AlertTitle"

const AlertDescription = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLParagraphElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <div
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join("text-sm [&_p]:leading-relaxed", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
AlertDescription.displayName = "AlertDescription"

export { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription }
